
---
title: "AI 4 CancerSurv"
subtitle: "Cancer Surveillance and AI Interest Group"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.hero}

### CSU Hackathon on Cancer Surveillance and AI

The CSU/IARC Hackathon on Cancer Surveillance and AI brings together people interested in leveraging practical applications of AI for cancer surveillance. This is a collaborative, hands-on meeting and a free, informal discussion space to explore how artificial intelligence, agentic workflows, and modern data tools can advance cancer surveillance research and foster collaboration.

Each session features an invited presenter who shares a project, idea, or tool, followed by open discussion and brainstorming with participants. This is a collaborative, low-pressure environment focused on discussion and idea exchange rather than formal outcomes. Participants are welcome to simply listen, ask questions, and contribute ideas.

:::

## Next meeting AI4CS

Live at [your-github-pages-link] + searchable Wiki.

- **Next session:** [14/05/2026]
- **Location:** [TBD / IARC building]
- **Time:** [4pm-5:30pm]
- **Online:** [Teams / Zoom / link]

Starting May 14th, 2026, AI4CS meets 4:00-5:30pm at IARC(webconf MSTeams) 

- Jornal club (20 min)
- GLOBOCAN chatBot (Yasmmin)

::: {.highlight}
:::

## Join

Just show up at the meeting site and introduce yourself. Remote participation will also be available You are welcome whenever you have the time, or a problem. Better both. To engage and contribute to agenda see contacts. 

::: {.highlight}
:::

## Contact

- Adalberto M. Filho  
- Kevin Martinez Folgar  
- Yasmmin Martins

::: {.highlight}
:::


## Resources

- [Hackathon Wiki](#)
- [Shared notes](#)
- [Code repository](#)
- [Session archive](#)


---

This page can be hosted with GitHub Pages.
